title: API Response Time Calculator
description: Calculate API latency budgets and throughput capacity for your services
viralHook: Stop guessing your API latency budget -- calculate it in seconds

props.title: API Latency Budget Calculator
props.description: Enter your API call parameters to calculate total latency, p99 estimates, and maximum throughput capacity.

inputs.label: Number of Sequential API Calls
inputs.helperText: Total sequential API calls in a single request chain

inputs.label: Average Response Time (ms)
inputs.helperText: Mean response time per API call in milliseconds

inputs.label: P99 Latency Target (ms)
inputs.helperText: Your target p99 latency SLA in milliseconds

inputs.label: Concurrent Users
inputs.helperText: Expected number of concurrent users hitting the endpoint

outputs.label: Total Chain Latency (ms)
outputs.description: Sum of all sequential API call response times

outputs.label: Estimated P99 Latency (ms)
outputs.description: Estimated p99 latency using 2.5x multiplier on average

outputs.label: P99 Budget Status
outputs.description: Whether your estimated p99 fits within your target SLA

outputs.label: Per-Call P99 Budget (ms)
outputs.description: Maximum allowed time per call to stay within p99 target

outputs.label: Throughput Capacity (req/s)
outputs.description: Maximum requests per second the system can handle
